allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\rajam\\desktop\\sellerja-website"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server/index.js" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r1 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/products" -Method GET; Write-Output "Product count: $\($r1.Count\)"; Write-Output "First product: $\($r1[0].name\) - $\($r1[0].price\)"; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/products?category=Electronics" -Method GET; Write-Output "Electronics count: $\($r2.Count\)"; $proc.Kill\(\))

PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\rajam\\desktop\\sellerja-website"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server/index.js" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $body = '{"name":"Test User","email":"test@sellerja.com","password":"test123"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; Write-Output "Registered: $\($r.user.name\)"; Write-Output "Token present: $\($r.token.Length -gt 0\)"; $token = $r.token; $headers = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $token" }; $cartBody = '{"product_id":1,"quantity":2}'; $rc = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/cart" -Method POST -Body $cartBody -ContentType "application/json" -Headers $headers; Write-Output "Cart add: $\($rc.success\)"; $cart = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3000/api/cart" -Method GET -Headers $headers; Write-Output "Cart items: $\($cart.Count\), qty: $\($cart[0].quantity\)"; $proc.Kill\(\))
